title: Morex Ribbon 7416.60/50-610 Swirl 2.5" X 50 YD Nylon Sheer Curling Wired Glitter Ribbon, Purple/Silver, Holiday Ribbons for Crafts and Christmas Decorations, Indoor Christmas Ribbon for Gift Wrapping
features: GREAT VALUE FOR THE COST: Use our purple/silver wired ribbon for Christmas tree ribbon garland, make indoor Christmas decorations for the home, and you still will have tons of material for sudden fall wedding decor ideas. Ribbon supplies that last longer.

ELEGANT AND STURDY: Sheer-thin Christmas ribbon design can show lights or pretty wrapping paper underneath. The reflective metallic finish helps add sparkle to your Christmas pillows or bridesmaids' engagement party ideas and bridal shower decorations.

MONEY SAVER: Save the planet and spend less money on wrapping. Even brown shipping paper looks stunning with our transparent tulle ribbon. Length is enough for your big and small Christmas tree ribbon decorations or the knot wedding shower gift ribbon.

PROFESSIONAL'S CHOICE: Crafters use wired Christmas ribbon for crafts or wedding arch ideas. Bakers — as a gift wrapping ribbon for wedding anniversary cakes or bridal shower cakes. Florists - like a thick ribbon for wreaths and wedding flower bouquets.

30+ YEARS OF SERVICE: The quality of the bulk ribbon makes Morex one of the best wholesale ribbon suppliers. Measures 2.5" X 50 YD. Christmas curling ribbon made from 100% nylon fabric. Make your own Christmas ribbon wired decorations with pleasure!
description: Elegant glitter swirls around this sheer ribbon with glittered wired edges. perfect for bows, wreaths, gifts, swags or even decorating the tree. 50-yard spool will complete multiple projects at a great value.
